title: chrysophyllum oliviforme var. monopyrenum
intro: Chrysophyllum oliviforme var. monopyrenum, also known as the monopyrenum variety of the oliviforme tree, is a plant species within the family Sapotaceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of this plant include the potential treatment of various conditions such as fever, cough, and skin infections, as well as its use as a natural remedy for wounds and digestive issues. The herbal preparations of Chrysophyllum oliviforme var. monopyrenum include infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which are often prepared from its leaves, bark, or roots.
